channel.title: Surfaced — Daily Tools
channel.description: Everyday apps and tools that make life better — updated daily.

item.title: Stitch 2.0 by Google
item.description: Stitch 2.0 is an AI-native design partner that enables the creation of beautiful, production-ready UI in seconds. It allows designers and developers to express their vision using natural language, voice commands, and context-aware agents. Stitch 2.0 facilitates seamless iteration and collaboration across images, code, and text, streamlining the entire UI design and development workflow. Its core value proposition is turning design concepts into high-fidelity interfaces with unprecedented speed and intelligence, effectively acting as a creative co-pilot.

item.title: Brila
item.description: Brila is an innovative website builder that generates one-page websites directly from your real Google Maps reviews. Unlike traditional website builders that rely on generic templates and require extensive content creation, Brila leverages authentic customer feedback to craft compelling narratives. It intelligently analyzes reviews to highlight key customer sentiments and reasons for choosing your business, ensuring your website speaks directly to potential clients. Brila offers a unique, content-first approach to web design, making it incredibly efficient for small businesses wanting a professional online presence without the hassle.

item.title: gbrain
item.description: gbrain is an opinionated, open-source agent brain built on the OpenClaw/Hermes framework, designed to empower advanced AI agents. It provides a structured and intelligent core for agents to process information, make decisions, and execute tasks within complex environments. Developed with specific design choices in mind, gbrain aims to offer a robust and efficient foundation for building sophisticated AI assistants and autonomous systems. Its strength lies in providing a coherent and opinionated architecture that simplifies the development of highly capable AI agents.

item.title: nuwa-skill
item.description: nuwa-skill is a groundbreaking AI tool that allows you to distill and replicate the thinking patterns and cognitive models of any individual. Instead of just learning information, it helps you understand *how* someone arrives at their conclusions, their decision-making heuristics, and their unique communication style. This is achieved through advanced AI analysis, creating a digital 'mind model' that can be studied and applied. It's particularly adept at capturing complex strategic thinking and problem-solving approaches, offering a unique way to learn from experts.

item.title: mempalace
item.description: mempalace is an open-source AI memory system designed to store, retrieve, and organize vast amounts of information, acting as an external brain for users. It aims to provide a highly efficient and benchmarked solution for managing personal knowledge, research, or creative project data. The system is free to use, offering a powerful alternative to proprietary solutions for those who value data ownership and customizability. It excels at enabling rapid recall and contextual linking of information, making it a standout for deep research dives.

item.title: Streamlit
item.description: Streamlit is an open-source Python library that makes it easy to create and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. You can turn data scripts into shareable web apps in minutes.

item.title: Calm
item.description: A meditation and sleep app that offers guided meditations, sleep stories, relaxing music, and breathing exercises. It aims to help users reduce anxiety, improve sleep, and increase mindfulness.

item.title: Evernote Web Clipper
item.description: A browser extension that allows you to save anything you see online directly into your Evernote account. You can save full articles, simplified versions, screenshots, or just links.

item.title: Spotify
item.description: A digital music, podcast, and video streaming service that gives you access to millions of songs and other content from creators all over the world. Users can find music based on mood, genre, or artist.

item.title: Google Docs
item.description: A free, web-based word processor that allows users to create and edit documents online. It facilitates real-time collaboration with other users, making it ideal for team projects.

item.title: Fiverr
item.description: Global freelance marketplace connecting businesses with skilled professionals for graphic design, web development, writing, video editing, and hundreds of other services.

item.title: Skillshare
item.description: Online learning community with thousands of short, project-based classes in design, business, technology, and creative skills — taught by industry professionals.

item.title: Notion
item.description: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, project management, and wikis — with AI-powered writing assistance and a modular block-based editor.

item.title: Shopify POS
item.description: Point-of-sale system that unifies online and in-person selling with inventory sync, customer profiles, and tap-to-pay — turning any device into a register.

item.title: Shopify
item.description: All-in-one e-commerce platform to create your online store, manage products, process payments, and scale your business — used by millions of merchants worldwide.

item.title: Instapaper
item.description: Instapaper is a 'read-it-later' service that allows users to save web articles, videos, and other online content for offline reading or viewing at a more convenient time. It strips away distractions like ads, pop-ups, and extraneous formatting, presenting a clean, customizable reading view across all devices.

item.title: Spendee
item.description: Spendee is a personal finance app that helps users track their income and expenses across multiple bank accounts, e-wallets, and cash transactions. It provides clear visualizations of spending habits through intuitive graphs and infographics, and allows for budget creation, bill tracking, and shared wallets.

item.title: Figma
item.description: Figma is a collaborative interface design tool that runs entirely in the browser. It allows multiple users to work on the same design file simultaneously, making it ideal for team projects from wireframing to high-fidelity prototyping. It also supports vector editing and asset creation for various digital platforms.

item.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
item.description: This online tool generates 'Lorem Ipsum' placeholder text, a standard dummy text used in the design and printing industry since the 1500s. It allows users to create text of various lengths, specified by paragraphs, words, or bytes, perfect for filling layouts and mockups. It can also generate HTML formatted text.

item.title: EyeLeo
item.description: EyeLeo is a free desktop application that helps combat eye strain by reminding you to take regular breaks from your computer screen. It enforces both short micro-breaks and longer breaks, optionally blocking your screen to ensure you rest your eyes and stand up. The breaks feature eye exercises and relaxation tips.

item.title: Online Stopwatch
item.description: This web-based tool provides a simple, accessible stopwatch, countdown timer, and alarm functionality directly in your browser. It's perfect for quickly timing tasks, workouts, or presentations without needing to download a dedicated application. You can also set custom alarms and interval timers.

item.title: Eagle App
item.description: Eagle is a powerful digital asset management tool crafted for designers, artists, and creative professionals to collect, organize, and browse all types of design assets. It supports a vast array of file formats, ranging from images and videos to fonts, audio, and even 3D models, with robust tagging and search capabilities.

item.title: Dynalist
item.description: Dynalist is an outliner software designed to help you organize your thoughts, notes, and tasks in a hierarchical list format. You can zoom into any item, add rich notes, attach files, and structure complex information effortlessly.

item.title: Toby
item.description: Toby is a browser extension that helps you organize your tabs into collections, making it easy to save, access, and share groups of tabs for different projects or topics. It allows you to create structured workspaces directly within your browser.

item.title: Raycast
item.description: Raycast is a powerful, customizable launcher for macOS that extends far beyond simple application launching. It allows users to control their desktop, manage windows, run scripts, search files, and interact with numerous third-party services via a vast library of extensions, performing complex tasks with just a few keystrokes.

item.title: Streaks
item.description: Streaks is a to-do list app designed to help users form good habits and break bad ones. You choose up to twelve tasks to complete each day, and the app tracks your progress, encouraging you to maintain your 'streak' for each habit. It offers integration with Apple Health to automatically track health-related habits.

item.title: Khan Academy
item.description: Khan Academy provides a vast library of free, high-quality educational content across various subjects, including math, science, arts, and humanities. It offers instructional videos, practice exercises, and personalized learning dashboards.

item.title: ProtonMail
item.description: ProtonMail is an end-to-end encrypted email service developed by CERN scientists, designed to protect user privacy and data security. It ensures that only the sender and intended recipient can read emails, even the service provider cannot.

item.title: RescueTime
item.description: RescueTime automatically tracks your time spent on applications and websites, categorizing your activities into productive, neutral, or distracting. It provides detailed reports and insights into your daily digital habits without manual input.

item.title: Trello
item.description: Trello is a visual collaboration tool that organizes your projects into boards, lists, and cards. It allows individuals and teams to track tasks, manage workflows, and collaborate effectively using a simple, intuitive interface inspired by the Kanban system.

item.title: WorldCat
item.description: WorldCat is the world's largest network of library content and services, allowing users to search the collections of libraries in their community and around the world. It provides information on books, articles, music, and more, helping people locate items in physical libraries.

item.title: Coolors
item.description: Coolors is a super fast color palette generator that helps designers and developers create, save, and share perfect color schemes in seconds. Users can lock specific colors and press the spacebar to generate new combinations instantly.

item.title: 1Password
item.description: 1Password is a secure password manager that stores all your passwords, secure notes, credit card details, and other sensitive information in an encrypted vault. It generates strong, unique passwords for every site and remembers them for you, filling them automatically.

item.title: Milanote
item.description: Milanote is a creative workspace for designers and creative teams to organize their ideas and projects into beautiful visual boards. It lets you write notes, upload files, save links, and drag-and-drop elements freely on an infinite canvas.

item.title: Convertio
item.description: Convertio is an online file converter that supports over 3700 different conversions between various file formats. You can upload almost any type of file – documents, images, audio, video, archives, presentations – and convert it to a wide range of output formats directly in your browser.

item.title: OneTab
item.description: OneTab is a browser extension that saves all your open tabs into a single list, converting them into one tab. This frees up memory, reduces tab clutter, and allows you to easily restore the tabs individually or all at once later.

item.title: TinyPNG
item.description: TinyPNG is a web service that uses smart lossy compression techniques to reduce the file size of your PNG and JPEG images. It analyzes the image for similar colors and patterns to compress it significantly without noticeable quality loss, making images web-ready.

item.title: Warp Terminal
item.description: Warp is a modern, AI-powered terminal designed for developers, combining the power of the command line with the familiarity of a text editor. It features AI command suggestions, block-based input/output for clarity, collaborative sessions, and a fast, intuitive user experience.

item.title: Raindrop.io
item.description: Raindrop.io is an all-in-one bookmark manager that allows users to save and organize articles, images, videos, and entire web pages from anywhere on the internet. It supports advanced features like nested collections, tags, powerful search, and permanent copies of web pages to prevent link rot.

item.title: Zero - Fasting Tracker
item.description: Zero helps users track their intermittent fasting periods with precision, offering various fasting protocols from 13-hour clean fasts to 72-hour extended fasts. It provides personalized insights into metabolic health and offers expert-led educational content to guide users on their wellness journey.

item.title: A Soft Murmur
item.description: A Soft Murmur is a free, web-based tool that generates customizable ambient background noise by allowing users to mix different sound elements like rain, thunder, waves, and coffee shop chatter. It helps create a personalized soundscape for various activities.

item.title: CleanShot X
item.description: CleanShot X is an all-in-one screen capturing tool for macOS, enabling users to take screenshots, record screen videos, and capture GIFs with powerful annotation and editing features. It also provides integrated cloud hosting for instant sharing of captures.

item.title: Pomofocus.io
item.description: Pomofocus.io is a customizable Pomodoro timer web application designed to help users manage their time effectively by breaking work into focused intervals, separated by short and long breaks. It includes sound notifications and basic task management features.

item.title: Lightshot
item.description: Lightshot is a simple yet powerful screenshot tool that allows users to quickly select an area on their screen, edit it with text, arrows, and shapes, and instantly share it online or save it to their computer. It's ideal for quick visual communication.

item.title: Krita
item.description: Krita is a free and open-source raster graphics editor designed primarily for digital painting, 2D animation, and comics creation. It offers a comprehensive set of brushes, layers, vector tools, and artistic filters, making it suitable for both professional artists and hobbyists.

item.title: f.lux
item.description: f.lux is a cross-platform computer program that adjusts a display's color temperature according to your location and time of day. It aims to reduce eye strain during night-time use by gradually removing blue light from the screen, making the display warmer as evening approaches.

item.title: ShareX
item.description: ShareX is a free and open-source program for Windows that allows you to capture screenshots or screencasts of any selected area with a single hotkey. It can also upload images, text, or any other type of file to over 80 supported destinations, including cloud storage, social media, and image hosts.

item.title: Squoosh
item.description: Squoosh is a free, open-source online image compressor developed by Google Chrome Labs. It allows users to compress and optimize images using various codecs and settings, comparing the results side-by-side in real-time.

item.title: Forest
item.description: Forest is a mobile and browser app that helps users stay focused by gamifying productivity. When you start a focus session, a virtual tree begins to grow. If you leave the app to check other sites or apps, your tree withers and dies.

item.title: Bear App
item.description: Bear App is a flexible writing application designed for notes, prose, code snippets, and more, available for Apple devices. It utilizes Markdown for quick formatting, organizes content with nested hashtags, and offers powerful search capabilities along with various export options.
